items.body_excerpt: Even more tough to watch because there’s no development backup plan to even pivot into. The Sky don’t have an initiating guard under 34 (unless you want to move Sheldon back on ball). They’re very hurt and already stopped playing Banham. Just have to stick to the plan and suffer through.

items.title: The Sky are a bit better than their record, but it is really tough watching these stretches where they completely deflate due to veterans making mistakes and disengaging from plays.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
The Sky are a bit better than their record, but it is really tough watching these stretches where they completely deflate due to veterans making mistakes and disengaging from plays. 

It’s different if the young kids are making/learning from mistakes but there’s no real timeline for growth here.

items.title: The Brooklyn Nets will decline their $6.25 million team option on Ziaire Williams, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old forward averaged 10.2 points in 56 games played for Brooklyn last season. Williams will become an unrestricted free agent.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Brooklyn Nets will decline their $6.25 million team option on Ziaire Williams, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old forward averaged 10.2 points in 56 games played for Brooklyn last season. Williams will become an unrestricted free agent.
